betaHint: ISPF implements a BPMN subset (not full 2.0). The palette hides unsupported shapes; unsupported XML is rejected when saving/parsing.
operatorApp.title: Operator App
operatorApp.hint: User tasks from this workflow appear in the selected Operator App sidebar under Tasks.
trigger.title: Trigger
instance.title: Instance
instance.empty: No active instance. Run the workflow to start one.
bpmn.title: BPMN 2.0
bpmn.hint: BPMN 2.0 notation (ISPF executable subset): classic task/event/gateway markers. Configure in the properties panel. Import adapts foreign BPMN. XML tab is for AI and edge cases.
bpmn.importError: Failed to render BPMN: {{error}}. Check XML in the Source tab.
bpmn.publishNatsHint: Requires ISPF_NATS_ENABLED and a live NATS connection. Check NATS status in System → Metrics. Smoke: ispf:subject=ispf.smoke.test, ispf:message=hello.
bpmn.fullscreenActive: Diagram editor is open fullscreen. Use Exit fullscreen or Esc to return here.
bpmn.props.title: Element properties
bpmn.props.empty: Select a node or sequence flow to edit properties.
bpmn.props.name: Name
bpmn.props.messageThrowOnly: Intermediate throw is message-only (server rejects none/signal throw).
bpmn.props.startEndHint: Start/end events need only a name for the ISPF engine.
bpmn.props.callActivityHint: Starts another WORKFLOW and waits until it completes (or fails the parent).
bpmn.notationSubset: Palette shows the ISPF executable BPMN 2.0 subset.
ispfReference.title: ISPF service task actions
ispfReference.hint: On a service task, set ispf:action and fields in the properties panel (or XML for AI).
